title: Robot girlfriends, recursive AI agents, full AI research, Happy Horse: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search covers a wide range of new AI developments including robot applications, multi-agent systems, video generation, and large language models. The video highlights tools like Happy Horse, Vista 4D, Talkie, and models such as Grok 4.3, SenseNova U1, and Nemotron 3 Nano Omni.
